evidence_notes: Target/need binding, fixed query order, honest early stop, skipped surfaces, metadata-only recommendation, weakest seed, and reroute handoff are exact.
All HG1-HG6 semantics and early-stop boundaries are satisfied with concise metadata-only output.
The fresh incumbent binds the target and knowledge need before investigation and preserves the fixed surface order.
It stops honestly after the sufficient canon-facing refs and marks every later surface skipped without pretending inspection.
Claim seed, uncertainty, source recommendation, handoff, reroute triggers, and authority boundaries satisfy all hard gates.
The repeat applies the exact query-first order and early stop.
It distinguishes supplied metadata coverage from underlying rule content and keeps the target mail undrafted and unapproved.
Its pass is consistent with the original Sol result and includes precise reroute triggers without operating later surfaces.
